name: daily-gm-reporter
description: Discord daily GM count reporter bot

scripts.start:dry-run: npm run build && DRY_RUN=true node dist/scripts/daily-count.js
scripts.test: npm run build && find tests -name '*.test.ts' -exec tsx --test {} +
scripts.test:watch: npm run build && find tests -name '*.test.ts' -exec tsx --test --watch {} +
